product: Serverless performance targets is now GA
tagline: Selecting the serverless performance setting for jobs and pipelines is now generally available.
what_it_does: Selecting the serverless performance setting for jobs and pipelines is now generally available. When the Performance optimized setting is enabled, your workload is optimized for faster startup and execution time. When disabled, the serverless workload runs on standard performance mode, which is optimized for cost and has a slightly higher launch latency.
why_it_matters: Selecting the serverless performance setting for jobs and pipelines is now generally available.
